name: RPlog_Luke_s_Return
title: Luke's Return
summary: Drawn across the galaxy by the dimmed, anguished cry of his fallen pupil, Jedi Master Luke Skywalker arrives on a Caspar beach where Jessalyn Valios, hiding under the name Annalise, has retreated after her descent toward the dark side. The Corellian Kyyel has already sought her out with kindness, and when Jessalyn lashes out in pain at both men, Luke opens the Force-bond between them and offers his soul, regret, and unconditional empathy rather than judgment. Joined by Han Solo and Chewbacca, Luke shelters Jessalyn through her grief just as her estranged lover Orson Tighe appears, forcing a raw, painful reckoning between the two over what they shared and lost. Orson, embittered and quoting Simon's claim that they are 'the fallen,' confesses he would rather have been destroyed than see her suffer, and finally walks away unable to find resolution. Though Luke cannot yet free Jessalyn or Orson from the darkness coiled around their hearts, he stands as a steadfast beacon of light, resolved to guide them back in time, however slow the healing may be.
